$description: Baseline physics check fields and representative values for L4 validation tests

representative_pass_checks.dimensional_consistency: pass: [H] = [hbar omega] = energy, both sides ML^2T^{-2}
representative_pass_checks.symmetry_compatibility: pass: Hamiltonian commutes with parity operator
representative_pass_checks.limiting_case_check: pass: classical harmonic oscillator recovered as n → ∞
representative_pass_checks.correspondence_check: pass: matches known result from Griffiths §2.3

representative_fail_checks.correspondence_check: fail: predicted gap 3.2 eV vs experimental 1.1 eV (Si band gap)
representative_fail_checks.symmetry_compatibility: inconclusive: SU(2) symmetry verified, translational invariance not confirmed

representative_contradiction_checks.correspondence_check: contradiction: parity conservation claim contradicts Redlich (1984) parity anomaly proof
representative_contradiction_checks.symmetry_compatibility: contradiction: parity transformation produces non-invariant term ∝ k

representative_stuck_checks.approximation_validity_check: stuck: perturbative expansion diverges for g > 0.5; nonperturbative method unavailable
